---
title: "Multi-Start HMM Analysis"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)
```

```{r}
suppressPackageStartupMessages({
library(tidyverse)
library(depmixS4)
library(clue)
library(patchwork)
})
```

```{r}
params <- list(
dt   = 0.02,
T    = 20,
seed = 11L,
tau_cmd      = 0.15,
cmd_proc_std = 0.005,
m = 1.0, c = 0.4, k = 4.0, plant_proc_std = 0.04,
tau_sa = 0.08, sa_meas_std = 0.03, sa_bias = 0.0,
tau_sb = 0.25, sb_meas_std = 0.02, sb_bias = 0.01,
alpha = 0.6, w1 = 1.0, w2 = 0.2,
train_frac = 0.5, na_cmd = 1L, nb_cmd = 1L,
na_plant = 2L, nb_plant = 2L,
na_sens  = 1L, nb_sens  = 1L,
K = 4
)

schedule <- tibble::tribble(
~regime,        ~t_start, ~t_end,
"Nominal",         0.0,      5.0,
"SensorNoisy",     5.0,     10.0,
"DynamicsOff",    10.0,     14.5,
"Drift",          14.5,     params$T
)

regime_order <- c("Nominal", "SensorNoisy", "DynamicsOff", "Drift")
```

```{r}
make_u_cmd <- function(n, amp = 1.0, dt = 0.02) {
t <- (0:(n-1)) * dt
u <- 0.6 * sin(2*pi*0.25*t) + 0.4 * sign(sin(2*pi*0.05*t))
step_every <- as.integer(2.5/dt)
for (i in seq(1, n, by = step_every)) u[i:n] <- u[i:n] + 0.2 * rnorm(1)
amp * u
}

lpf_first_order <- function(u, tau, dt, proc_std = 0.0) {
n <- length(u); y <- numeric(n)
a <- exp(-dt / max(tau, 1e-6))
for (k in 2:n) y[k] <- a*y[k-1] + (1 - a)*u[k-1] + proc_std*rnorm(1)
y
}

plant_msd <- function(u, dt, m, c, k, proc_std = 0.0) {
n <- length(u); x <- numeric(n); v <- numeric(n)
for (kk in 2:n) {
  acc <- (u[kk-1] - c*v[kk-1] - k*x[kk-1]) / m + proc_std*rnorm(1)
  v[kk] <- v[kk-1] + dt*acc
  x[kk] <- x[kk-1] + dt*v[kk-1]
}
list(pos = x, vel = v)
}

sensor_first_order <- function(xpos, dt, tau, meas_std = 0.0, bias = 0.0) {
y <- lpf_first_order(xpos, tau, dt, 0)
y + bias + rnorm(length(y), sd = meas_std)
}

fit_arx <- function(y, u, na, nb) {
stopifnot(length(y) == length(u))
kmax <- length(y); p <- max(na, nb)
if (kmax <= p) stop("ARX series too short.")
rows <- vector("list", kmax - p); Tvec <- numeric(kmax - p)
for (k in (p+1):kmax) {
  phi <- c(sapply(1:na, function(i) y[k-i]),
           sapply(1:nb, function(j) u[k-j]))
  rows[[k - p]] <- phi
  Tvec[k - p]  <- y[k]
}
Phi   <- do.call(rbind, rows)
theta <- as.numeric(solve(t(Phi) %*% Phi, t(Phi) %*% Tvec))
list(theta = theta, na = na, nb = nb)
}

sim_arx <- function(u, y_seed, model) {
na <- model$na; nb <- model$nb; theta <- model$theta
n <- length(u); yhat <- numeric(n)
stopifnot(length(y_seed) >= na)
yhat[1:na] <- tail(y_seed, na)
p <- max(na, nb)
for (k in (p+1):n) {
  phi <- c(sapply(1:na, function(i) yhat[k-i]),
           sapply(1:nb, function(j) u[k-j]))
  yhat[k] <- sum(theta * phi)
}
yhat
}

simulate_with_faults <- function(params, schedule) {
set.seed(params$seed)
n <- as.integer(params$T/params$dt)
t <- (0:(n-1)) * params$dt
u_cmd <- make_u_cmd(n, dt = params$dt)

u_act_P <- lpf_first_order(u_cmd, params$tau_cmd, params$dt, params$cmd_proc_std)
pl      <- plant_msd(u_act_P, params$dt, params$m, params$c, params$k, params$plant_proc_std)
x_pos_P <- pl$pos; x_vel_P <- pl$vel
yA_P    <- sensor_first_order(x_pos_P, params$dt, params$tau_sa, params$sa_meas_std, params$sa_bias)
yB_P    <- sensor_first_order(x_pos_P, params$dt, params$tau_sb, params$sb_meas_std, params$sb_bias)
y_fused_P <- params$alpha*yA_P + (1 - params$alpha)*yB_P
z_P <- params$w1*x_pos_P + params$w2*x_vel_P

split <- as.integer(params$train_frac * n)
arx_cmd   <- fit_arx(u_act_P[1:split], u_cmd[1:split],     params$na_cmd,   params$nb_cmd)
arx_plant <- fit_arx(x_pos_P[1:split], u_act_P[1:split],   params$na_plant, params$nb_plant)
arx_sa    <- fit_arx(yA_P[1:split],    x_pos_P[1:split],   params$na_sens,  params$nb_sens)
arx_sb    <- fit_arx(yB_P[1:split],    x_pos_P[1:split],   params$na_sens,  params$nb_sens)

u_act_A <- sim_arx(u_cmd,   y_seed = u_act_P[1:params$na_cmd],   arx_cmd)
xpos_A  <- sim_arx(u_act_A, y_seed = x_pos_P[1:params$na_plant], arx_plant)
xvel_A  <- c(0, diff(xpos_A)/params$dt)
yA_A    <- sim_arx(xpos_A, y_seed = yA_P[1:params$na_sens],     arx_sa)
yB_A    <- sim_arx(xpos_A, y_seed = yB_P[1:params$na_sens],     arx_sb)
y_fused_A <- params$alpha*yA_A + (1 - params$alpha)*yB_A
z_A <- params$w1*xpos_A + params$w2*xvel_A

regime_by_t <- rep("Nominal", n)
for (r in seq_len(nrow(schedule))) {
  idx <- which(t >= schedule$t_start[r] & t < schedule$t_end[r])
  regime_by_t[idx] <- schedule$regime[r]
}

x_pos_A_fault <- xpos_A
yA_A_fault    <- yA_A
yB_A_fault    <- yB_A

for (k in seq_len(n)) {
  reg <- regime_by_t[k]
  if (reg == "SensorNoisy") {
    yA_A_fault[k] <- yA_A_fault[k] + rnorm(1, 0, 0.06)
    yB_A_fault[k] <- yB_A_fault[k] + rnorm(1, 0, 0.05)
  } else if (reg == "DynamicsOff") {
    x_pos_A_fault[k] <- 0.8 * x_pos_A_fault[k]
  } else if (reg == "Drift") {
    yA_A_fault[k] <- yA_A_fault[k] + 0.0007 * (k-1)
  }
}
y_fused_A_fault <- params$alpha*yA_A_fault + (1 - params$alpha)*yB_A_fault
z_A_fault <- params$w1*x_pos_A_fault + params$w2*c(0, diff(x_pos_A_fault)/params$dt)

E <- tibble::tibble(
  t   = t,
  e0  = u_act_A          - u_act_P,
  e1  = x_pos_A_fault    - x_pos_P,
  e2a = yA_A_fault       - yA_P,
  e2b = yB_A_fault       - yB_P,
  e3  = y_fused_A_fault  - y_fused_P,
  e4  = z_A_fault        - z_P
)

list(E = E, t = t, regime_t = regime_by_t)
}

compute_metrics <- function(confusion_mat) {
n_classes <- nrow(confusion_mat)
class_names <- rownames(confusion_mat)
accuracy <- sum(diag(confusion_mat)) / sum(confusion_mat)
metrics <- tibble::tibble(
  class = class_names,
  TP = numeric(n_classes), FP = numeric(n_classes),
  FN = numeric(n_classes), TN = numeric(n_classes),
  precision = numeric(n_classes), recall = numeric(n_classes),
  f1 = numeric(n_classes), specificity = numeric(n_classes),
  support = numeric(n_classes)
)
for (i in seq_len(n_classes)) {
  TP <- confusion_mat[i, i]
  FP <- sum(confusion_mat[i, ]) - TP
  FN <- sum(confusion_mat[, i]) - TP
  TN <- sum(confusion_mat) - TP - FP - FN
  precision <- ifelse(TP + FP > 0, TP / (TP + FP), 0)
  recall <- ifelse(TP + FN > 0, TP / (TP + FN), 0)
  f1 <- ifelse(precision + recall > 0, 2 * precision * recall / (precision + recall), 0)
  specificity <- ifelse(TN + FP > 0, TN / (TN + FP), 0)
  metrics$TP[i] <- TP; metrics$FP[i] <- FP
  metrics$FN[i] <- FN; metrics$TN[i] <- TN
  metrics$precision[i] <- precision; metrics$recall[i] <- recall
  metrics$f1[i] <- f1; metrics$specificity[i] <- specificity
  metrics$support[i] <- sum(confusion_mat[, i])
}
p_o <- accuracy
p_e <- sum((rowSums(confusion_mat) / sum(confusion_mat)) *
            (colSums(confusion_mat) / sum(confusion_mat)))
kappa <- (p_o - p_e) / (1 - p_e)
list(per_class = metrics, accuracy = accuracy,
     macro_f1 = mean(metrics$f1), kappa = kappa)
}

hungarian_map <- function(vpath, gt_regime, regime_order) {
tab <- table(State = vpath, Regime = gt_regime)
C <- as.matrix(tab)
nr <- nrow(C); nc <- ncol(C)
if (nr > nc) C <- cbind(C, matrix(0, nrow = nr, ncol = nr - nc))
if (nc > nr) C <- rbind(C, matrix(0, nrow = nc - nr, ncol = nc))
perm_full <- clue::solve_LSAP(max(C) - C)
regime_names <- c(colnames(tab), rep("<pad>", ncol(C) - ncol(tab)))
map_regimes <- regime_names[perm_full][seq_len(nrow(tab))]
names(map_regimes) <- rownames(tab)
map_regimes[as.character(vpath)]
}
```

```{r}
sim <- simulate_with_faults(params, schedule)
E   <- sim$E
t   <- sim$t
gt  <- tibble::tibble(t = t, regime = sim$regime_t)

feat <- E %>%
dplyr::transmute(
  t,
  e0 = e0, e1 = e1, e2a = e2a, e2b = e2b, e3 = e3, e4 = e4,
  e_abs_sum = abs(e0)+abs(e1)+abs(e2a)+abs(e2b)+abs(e3)+abs(e4),
  e_rms     = sqrt((e0^2+e1^2+e2a^2+e2b^2+e3^2+e4^2)/6),
  e1_diff   = c(0, diff(e1)),
  e3_diff   = c(0, diff(e3))
) %>%
dplyr::mutate(dplyr::across(-t, ~ as.numeric(scale(.x))))

Ez <- feat %>% dplyr::select(-t) %>% as.data.frame()
fams <- rep(list(gaussian()), ncol(Ez))
```

```{r}
n_starts <- 10
best_ll  <- -Inf
best_fm  <- NULL
all_ll   <- numeric(n_starts)

for (r in 1:n_starts) {
  mod <- depmix(response = lapply(names(Ez), function(nm) as.formula(paste0(nm, "~ 1"))),
                data = Ez, nstates = params$K, family = fams)
  fm_try <- tryCatch(fit(mod, verbose = FALSE), error = function(e) NULL)
  if (!is.null(fm_try)) {
    all_ll[r] <- logLik(fm_try)
    if (logLik(fm_try) > best_ll) {
      best_ll <- logLik(fm_try)
      best_fm <- fm_try
    }
  } else {
    all_ll[r] <- NA
  }
}

fm <- best_fm
```

```{r}
cat(sprintf("Log-likelihoods across %d restarts:\n", n_starts))
for (r in 1:n_starts) {
  cat(sprintf("  Restart %2d: %.2f%s\n", r, all_ll[r],
              ifelse(!is.na(all_ll[r]) && all_ll[r] == best_ll, "  <-- best", "")))
}
cat(sprintf("\nBest log-likelihood: %.2f\n", best_ll))
cat(sprintf("Range: %.2f\n", max(all_ll, na.rm=TRUE) - min(all_ll, na.rm=TRUE)))
```

```{r}
all_vpaths <- matrix(NA, nrow = length(t), ncol = n_starts)
for (r in 1:n_starts) {
  mod <- depmix(response = lapply(names(Ez), function(nm) as.formula(paste0(nm, "~ 1"))),
                data = Ez, nstates = params$K, family = fams)
  fm_try <- tryCatch(fit(mod, verbose = FALSE), error = function(e) NULL)
  if (!is.null(fm_try)) {
    vp <- viterbi(fm_try)$state
    detected <- hungarian_map(vp, gt$regime, regime_order)
    all_vpaths[, r] <- detected
  }
}

best_vpath <- viterbi(fm)$state
best_detected <- hungarian_map(best_vpath, gt$regime, regime_order)

agreement <- numeric(n_starts)
for (r in 1:n_starts) {
  if (!any(is.na(all_vpaths[, r]))) {
    agreement[r] <- mean(all_vpaths[, r] == best_detected)
  } else {
    agreement[r] <- NA
  }
}

cat("Viterbi path agreement with best solution (after Hungarian relabeling):\n")
for (r in 1:n_starts) {
  cat(sprintf("  Restart %2d: %.1f%%\n", r, agreement[r] * 100))
}
cat(sprintf("\nMean agreement: %.1f%%\n", mean(agreement, na.rm = TRUE) * 100))
cat(sprintf("Min  agreement: %.1f%%\n", min(agreement, na.rm = TRUE) * 100))
```

```{r}
gt_factor   <- factor(gt$regime, levels = regime_order)
pred_factor <- factor(best_detected, levels = regime_order)
conf_mat    <- table(Predicted = pred_factor, Actual = gt_factor)
metrics     <- compute_metrics(conf_mat)

cat(sprintf("Accuracy (best restart): %.4f\n", metrics$accuracy))
cat(sprintf("Macro F1:                %.4f\n", metrics$macro_f1))
cat(sprintf("Cohen's Kappa:           %.4f\n", metrics$kappa))
cat("\nPer-class F1:\n")
print(metrics$per_class %>% dplyr::select(class, precision, recall, f1) %>%
      dplyr::mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~round(.x, 4))))
```

```{r fig.width=8, fig.height=4}
tibble(restart = 1:n_starts, loglik = all_ll) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = restart, y = loglik)) +
  geom_point(size = 3, color = "#2d5a7b") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = best_ll, linetype = "dashed", color = "darkred") +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = 1:n_starts) +
  labs(title = "Log-Likelihood Across EM Restarts",
       x = "Restart", y = "Log-Likelihood") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13)
```

```{r fig.width=10, fig.height=5}
tibble(restart = 1:n_starts, pct_agree = agreement * 100) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = factor(restart), y = pct_agree)) +
  geom_col(fill = "#547792", width = 0.6) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 100, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray40") +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 105)) +
  labs(title = "Viterbi Path Agreement with Best Solution",
       x = "Restart", y = "Agreement (%)") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13)
```

```{r fig.width=12, fig.height=10}
regime_colors <- c('Nominal' = 'darkgreen', 'SensorNoisy' = 'darkorange',
                   'DynamicsOff' = 'darkred', 'Drift' = 'navy')

conf_df <- as.data.frame(conf_mat)
names(conf_df) <- c("Predicted", "Actual", "Count")

conf_pct <- conf_df %>%
dplyr::group_by(Actual) %>%
dplyr::mutate(Percentage = Count / sum(Count) * 100) %>%
dplyr::ungroup()

p1 <- ggplot(conf_pct, aes(x = Actual, y = Predicted, fill = Percentage)) +
geom_tile(color = "white", size = 1) +
geom_text(aes(label = sprintf("%d\n(%.1f%%)", Count, Percentage)),
          color = "white", fontface = "bold", size = 4) +
scale_fill_gradient(low = "#547792", high = "#1a3a52", limits = c(0, 100)) +
labs(title = "Confusion Matrix (HMM Regime Classification)",
     subtitle = sprintf("Overall Accuracy: %.1f%%, Cohen's Kappa: %.3f",
                        metrics$accuracy * 100, metrics$kappa),
     x = "Actual Regime", y = "Predicted Regime", fill = "% of Actual") +
theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
      panel.grid = element_blank())

metrics_long <- metrics$per_class %>%
dplyr::select(class, precision, recall, f1) %>%
tidyr::pivot_longer(cols = -class, names_to = "metric", values_to = "value") %>%
dplyr::mutate(metric = factor(metric, levels = c("precision", "recall", "f1"),
                              labels = c("Precision", "Recall", "F1-Score")))

p2 <- ggplot(metrics_long, aes(x = class, y = value, fill = metric)) +
geom_col(position = position_dodge(width = 0.8), width = 0.7) +
geom_hline(yintercept = 0.9, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray40") +
scale_fill_manual(values = c("Precision" = "#547792", "Recall" = "#89a8b8", "F1-Score" = "#2d5a7b")) +
scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 1.05), breaks = seq(0, 1, 0.2)) +
labs(title = "Per-Class Classification Metrics",
     x = "Regime", y = "Score", fill = "Metric") +
theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 15, hjust = 1),
      legend.position = "bottom")

plot_data <- tibble::tibble(
t = t,
ground_truth = gt$regime,
predicted = best_detected,
correct = gt$regime == best_detected
)

p3 <- ggplot(plot_data, aes(x = t)) +
geom_rect(data = schedule,
          aes(xmin = t_start, xmax = t_end, ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf, fill = regime),
          inherit.aes = FALSE, alpha = 0.2) +
geom_point(aes(y = 1, color = correct), size = 0.3, alpha = 0.8) +
scale_fill_manual(values = regime_colors) +
scale_color_manual(values = c('TRUE' = 'green3', 'FALSE' = 'red')) +
labs(title = "Classification Correctness Over Time",
     subtitle = "Green = correct, Red = misclassification",
     x = "Time (s)", y = "", fill = "Ground Truth", color = "Correct") +
theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
theme(axis.text.y = element_blank(),
      axis.ticks.y = element_blank(),
      panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(),
      panel.grid.minor.y = element_blank())

(p1 | p2) / p3 + plot_layout(heights = c(2, 1))
```

```{r fig.width=12, fig.height=6}
posteriors <- posterior(fm)
post_probs <- posteriors[, paste0("S", 1:params$K)]

best_map <- hungarian_map(best_vpath, gt$regime, regime_order)
mapping_df <- unique(data.frame(state = best_vpath, regime = best_map, stringsAsFactors = FALSE))
state_to_regime <- setNames(mapping_df$regime, mapping_df$state)

gamma_long <- tibble::tibble(time = rep(1:length(t), params$K),
                             state = rep(1:params$K, each = length(t)),
                             prob = unlist(post_probs)) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(regime = state_to_regime[as.character(state)],
                t = t[time])

p_gamma <- ggplot(gamma_long, aes(t, prob, color = regime)) +
  geom_rect(data = schedule,
            aes(xmin = t_start, xmax = t_end, ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf, fill = regime),
            inherit.aes = FALSE, alpha = 0.10, color = NA) +
  geom_vline(data = schedule, aes(xintercept = t_start),
             linetype = "dashed", color = "gray40", alpha = 0.6) +
  geom_line(size = 1) +
  labs(title = "HMM posteriors mapped to ground-truth regimes",
       x = "Time (s)", y = expression(gamma[t](regime)), color = "Regime", fill = "Regime") +
  theme_minimal() +
  scale_fill_manual(values = regime_colors) +
  scale_color_manual(values = regime_colors)

print(p_gamma)
```

```{r fig.width=12, fig.height=8}
feat_w_regime <- feat %>% dplyr::left_join(gt, by = "t")

diag_box <- feat_w_regime %>%
  tidyr::pivot_longer(cols = -c(t, regime), names_to = "feature", values_to = "val") %>%
  ggplot(aes(regime, val)) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.alpha = 0.2, size = 1) +
  facet_wrap(~ feature, scales = "free_y") +
  labs(title = "Feature separability by ground-truth regime",
       x = "Regime", y = "Feature value (z-scored)") +
  theme_minimal()

print(diag_box)
```
